# ZENNARA Property & Facility Management

> East Africa's eco-responsible property and facility management company, based in Nairobi, Kenya. ZENNARA delivers institutional-grade property and facility management with a focus on sustainable, green building operations.

ZENNARA is a management and operations partner. It does not handle property sales or transactions. Its core differentiator is Eco FM: green-certified facility services covering energy efficiency, waste diversion, water management, and carbon reporting. A Client Portal gives clients access to payments, maintenance requests, eco reports, and documents.

## Pages
- [Home](https://zennara.co.ke/): Overview, services, managed portfolio, and eco commitment.
- [Services](https://zennara.co.ke/services): Full range of property and facility management services.
- [Portfolio](https://zennara.co.ke/portfolio): Commercial and residential properties under management in Nairobi.
- [Eco FM](https://zennara.co.ke/eco): Eco-responsible facility management, sustainability commitments, and green performance reporting.
- [About](https://zennara.co.ke/about): Company background and values (Luxury, Trust, Precision, Sustainability).
- [Insights](https://zennara.co.ke/blog): Articles on facility management, sustainability, and green building operations.
- [Contact](https://zennara.co.ke/contact): Enquiries via WhatsApp, email, or form.

## Services
- Property Management: residential and commercial property management.
- Facility Management: smart building operations, maintenance, and engineering.
- Eco FM Services: green-certified cleaning, energy, and waste management.
- Building Maintenance: preventive and reactive maintenance by certified contractors.
- Eco Cleaning: eco-certified commercial and residential cleaning.
- Security Coordination: end-to-end security management across all properties.
- Inspections: scheduled condition surveys and compliance inspections.
- FM Consultancy: advisory on operations, efficiency, and sustainability strategy.

## Insights
- [How Eco FM Reduces Building Operating Costs](https://zennara.co.ke/blog/how-eco-fm-reduces-operating-costs): How eco-responsible facility management lowers running costs through energy, water, and waste savings.
- [Green Building Certification Explained](https://zennara.co.ke/blog/green-building-certification-explained): What the major green building standards measure and why they matter to property owners.
- [A Practical Guide to Preventive Maintenance](https://zennara.co.ke/blog/practical-guide-to-preventive-maintenance): How a structured preventive maintenance programme protects asset value.
